title: IT Cybersecurity Specialist (INFOSEC)
description: This position is located in the Threat Intelligence and Risk Analysis Branch (TIRAB). TIRAB serves as the organization's primary radar for emerging cyber threats, especially those targeting intellectual property. This branch employs cutting edge analytical tools and methodologies to discern patterns, predict potential threats, and assess vulnerabilities.

title: IT Cybersecurity Specialist (INFOSEC)
description: This position is located in the Forensics and Vulnerability Management Branch (FVMB). FVMB prevents cyberattacks before they happen and if they occur, determines how they happened and responds. This is performed through expertise in advanced intrusion detection, computer forensics, vulnerability management, and penetration testing.

If it is considered Computer Science, chances are good we have at least one team focused on it.

title: Chief Information Security Officer
description: The position reports to the Chief Information Officer. The position serves as the SBA's Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) over the SBA's Information Security Office. The CISO provides management leadership in information security policy and guidance, expert advice, and collaboration with offices, oversight agencies, and the Congress on matters relating to protecting SBA information assets in support of the Agency's trillion-dollar portfolio of small business programs.

Meade or San Antonio, TX. . Salary Range for San Antonio, TX: $115,475 - $157,818 Salary Range for Ft. Meade, MD: $131,841 - $180,186

title: SUPERVISORY IT CYBERSECURITY SPECIALIST (INFOSEC)
description: This is a public notice flyer to notify interested applicants of anticipated vacancies. Applications will not be accepted through this flyer. Interested applicants must follow the directions in the "How to Apply" section of this flyer to be considered. There may or may not be actual vacancies filled from this flyer. Notice of Result letters will not be sent to applicants who respond to this flyer.

title: Biomedical Equipment Support Specialist(Information Systems)
description: Serves as a Biomedical Equipment Support Specialist (BESS) specializing in information systems within the Healthcare Technology Management (HTM) Service at the Bay Pines VA Healthcare System. The BESS maintains medical servers and networks, medical equipment, diagnostic software, virtual platforms, and clinical applications software. * Recruitment/Relocation Incentive may be authorized for a highly qualified candidate subject to approval, available funding, and in accordance with policy.*

title: Information Technology Specialist (Information Security)
description: About the Position: This position is located at the Joint Pathology Center in Silver Spring, Maryland. The role is primarily sedentary office work involving extended periods of computer use. The work environment consists of a collaborative office setting. Standard duty hours are 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM, though it may require participation in scheduled shift coverage or on-call support to maintain operational cybersecurity oversight.

title: IT SPEC (NETWORK) - TITLE 32
description: THIS IS A NATIONAL GUARD TITLE 32 EXCEPTED SERVICE POSITION. This position is for an IT Specialist (Network Services), Position Description Number D1822000 located in the 224th JCSS, Brunswick, GA. This is a full-time, Excepted Permanent, dual status position which requires Georgia Air National Guard Membership. Area of Consideration: Current members of the Air National Guard, Air Force Reserve or Air Force Active Duty component.

title: IT CYBERSECURITY SPECIALIST (INFOSEC)
description: This position is in the Excepted Service and does NOT convey eligibility to be converted to the Competitive Service. It is being recruited under 10 U.S.C. 1599f into the Cyber Excepted Service (CES) personnel system. Positions in the Cyber Excepted Service are positions necessary to carry out and support the mission of the United States Cyber Command. It is in the Professional Work Category at the Senior Work Level within the CES Occupational Structure. It is located in the DISA-RS921.

title: SUPERVISORY IT SPECIALIST (PLCYPLN)
description: Serves as a Supervisory IT Specialist (PLCYPLN) (Chief, Enterprise Data Services) GS-14 in a Defense Commissary Agency (DeCA) HQ location. The primary purpose of this position is to serve as the EDS Division Chief, leading the planning, implementation, and oversight of enterprise IT operations, including cybersecurity, data management, server and network infrastructure, and enterprise architecture compliance. Read the entire announcement before starting the application process.

organization: Air Force Elements, U.S. Transportation Command

For more information please see: AcqDemo This position is part of the Air Force Elements, U.S. Transportation Command, Transportation Command. The incumbent will be responsible for ** Serves as a Cyber Operations Planner within the USTRANSCOM Command, Control, Communications and Cyber Systems Directorate.

title: Director, Resource Management Staff
locations: District of Columbia, District of Columbia
description: The JMD Office of Chief Information Officer (OCIO) leads the DOJ's information technology (IT) and cybersecurity programs, setting strategic direction, driving innovation, and orchestrating IT operations, cybersecurity, and resource management within the OCIO and between OCIO and DOJ component agencies. The CIO has oversight responsibility for all IT acquisitions across the Department and IT budget requests of the Department's component agencies.

title: IT SPECIALIST (INFOSEC)
description: This IT SPECIALIST (INFOSEC) position, is located with the 195th Operations Group and is part of the CA 195th WG.

title: Student Intern (OCIO)
organization: Executive Office for U.S. Attorneys and the Office of the U.S. Attorneys
description: These positions are located in the Department of Justice, Executive Office for United States Attorneys, Office of the Chief Information Officer. EOUSA provides executive and administrative support for the 94 United States Attorneys' offices (USAOs) and coordinates and directs the relationships between the USAOs and other DOJ components and federal agencies. For more information on the Department of Justice and the United States Attorneys' Offices, visit https://www.justice.gov/usao/eousa.

title: IT SPECIALIST (INFOSEC)
description: This position is for a IT SPECIALIST (INFOSEC), PD# D2178P01, part of the Nevada Air National Guard. The purpose of this position is to serve as the Base Information Assurance Manager who is the wing commander's authority and focal point for Information Assurance. Manages the communication-computer security (COMPUSEC) program, Electronic Key Management System (EKMS), Emission Security, and Information Assurance Awareness Programs.

title: Attorney Advisor(International)(Public Notice Flyer)
description: The Commercial Law Development Program (CLDP) of the Office of the General Counsel, U.S. Department of Commerce, is seeking an individual with exceptional analytical, organizational, and interpersonal communication skills to join our team of international technical assistance Attorney-Advisors to engage in legal reform work related to telecommunications and the information and communication technology (ICT) sector, under the Digital Connectivity and Cybersecurity Partnership (DCCP).

title: Network Architect-DHA
description: IT Specialist (APPSW) Network Architect positions are being filled through the Office of Personnel Management's delegated Direct Hire Authority, open to all U.S. citizens. Selections made under this bulletin will be processed as new appointments to the civil service. Current civil service employees would, therefore, be given new appointments to the civil service. Under the provisions of the Direct Hire Authority, Veterans Preference and the "Rule of Many" do not apply.
